Interface Agent

All Known Implementing Classes:
BinOpAgent, IncAgent, ParallelAgent, PlusAgent
public interface Agent
Core interface for computational nodes in the pub-sub graph engine.

An Agent subscribes to one or more Topics and reacts to incoming Messages by publishing results to output topics. Agents are wired together at runtime by Config implementations (e.g. GenericConfig) and may be wrapped in a ParallelAgent for asynchronous execution.

Thread safety: callback(java.lang.String, graph.Message) may be invoked concurrently from multiple publisher threads unless the agent is wrapped in ParallelAgent. Implementations that hold mutable state must synchronize access (see PlusAgent and IncAgent).

See Also:
  • Topic
  • ParallelAgent
  • Message

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    callback(String topic, Message msg)
    Handles an incoming message published on a subscribed topic.
    void
    close()
    Releases resources held by this agent.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the unique display name of this agent.
    void
    reset()
    Resets any internal state accumulated during processing.

  • Method Details

    • getName

      String getName()
      Returns the unique display name of this agent.

      Used as the node identifier when building a Graph visualization.

      Returns:
      the agent name (e.g. "PlusAgent", "Aplus")

    • reset

      void reset()
      Resets any internal state accumulated during processing.

      Called to clear cached input values before a new computation cycle.

    • callback

      void callback(String topic, Message msg)
      Handles an incoming message published on a subscribed topic.
      Parameters:
      topic - the name of the topic that published the message
      msg - the published message value

    • close

      void close()
      Releases resources held by this agent.

      Implementations should unsubscribe from topics and stop any background threads.
